name: Login Box
title: Login Box / Minimal
summary: A compact authentication panel with semantic fields, remembered-session toggle, and primary/secondary actions.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading shown at the top of the login panel.

props.name: description
props.default: Sign in to continue managing your Dashbase workspace and recent approvals.
props.description: Supporting copy shown under the heading.

props.name: emailPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the email field.

props.name: passwordPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the password field.

props.name: rememberLabel
props.default: Keep me signed in for 30 days
props.description: Copy next to the remember-session checkbox.

slots.name: footerNote
slots.description: Optional content rendered below the action buttons.
